member.office_address: 1230 Longworth House Office Building Washington DC 20515-0513

form_analysis.form_header_text: Congressman Adam Gray FY2027 Appropriations Programmatic and Language Request Form
form_analysis.form_instructions_text: Submit this form by March 6th, 2026. Please provide all information as appropriate to complete your request. Incomplete forms may result in your request not receiving proper consideration. Please note that this is not the form for Community Project Funding, that form will be posted separately. Thank you for your interest in submitting an appropriations request to my congressional office for Fiscal Year (FY) 2027. It is important to note that the House Committee on Appropriations will only consider requests for programmatic increases or decreases. Please fill out separate requests for language and programmatic funding. You do not need to fill out both sections for each request.

sections.description: Specify the request type, budget justification, and funding history.

fields.label: All Defense Line Number and Program Element (PE)
fields.help_text: Please tell us the line number in the PBR, Program Element, or program name if requesting language.
fields.rationale: This section does not apply as the request is not for the Defense subcommittee.

fields.label: Please identify the type of request:
fields.help_text: NOTE: Each request requires an individual form, if you have multiple requests please fill out a separate form for each - this includes programmatic requests with language associated.
fields.rationale: The request context specifies this is a programmatic funding request for $9 billion.

fields.label: Amount/policy included specifically for this item in the President's budget request for FY 2026 (if available):
fields.draft_value:
* $3,908,000,000 (FY 2026 President's Budget Request)
* Note: This request was significantly below the final FY 2026 Enacted level of $7,250,000,000
fields.rationale: Value taken directly from the SMD Topline Funding History provided in the reference context.

fields.label: Description of program request:
fields.help_text: Please give a brief justification for your request and include Agency, Account, Agency Subdivision, Program, and Activity.
fields.draft_value:
* Agency: NASA
* Account: Science Mission Directorate (SMD)
* Funding Request: $9,000,000,000
* Supports comprehensive scientific exploration across Earth Science, Planetary Science, Astrophysics, and Heliophysics
fields.rationale: Uses the provided funding ask of $9B and the specific account/subdivision details from the reference values.

fields.label: Funding request for FY 2026:
options: Support the President's FY2024 budget request
fields.rationale: The request is for a specific funding amount ($9 billion) outlined in the strategic ask.

fields.label: Federal funding history:
fields.help_text: E.g. $100,000 in FY22, $150,000 in FY23. Please include the complete funding history.
fields.draft_value:
* FY 2025 Enacted: $7,334,000,000
* FY 2026 Enacted: $7,250,000,000
* FY 2027 President's Budget Request: [TBD/Not Released]
fields.rationale: Provides the exact enacted figures from the SMD Topline Funding History for the most recent two fiscal years.

fields.label: If requesting a funding increase, please suggest an appropriate offset from this bill:
fields.rationale: The consultant is not provided with specific offset recommendations; it is standard practice for programmatic requests of this scale to be considered within the subcommittee's overall allocation.

sections.description: Specifics for bill or report language requests.

fields.label: Description of Language Request:
fields.help_text: Please give a brief justification for your request.
fields.rationale: The Request Context explicitly states 'Language Requested: N/A'.

fields.label: Previous Language Request:
fields.help_text: Please list the fiscal year and provide the exact report or bill language as it appears in most recent House, Senate, or Conference report.
fields.rationale: The Request Context explicitly states 'Language Requested: N/A'.

fields.label: Exact Language Request
fields.help_text: Please include the exact language you are requesting.
fields.rationale: The Request Context explicitly states 'Language Requested: N/A'.

sections.description: Ranking of the request and its specific benefit to the taxpayer and the district.

fields.label: Are you making this request to other offices? If yes, please list all offices receiving this request:
fields.draft_value:
* Request being submitted to multiple House offices.
* Reps. Don Bacon (R-NE) and Judy Chu (D-CA) are leading an existing multi-member letter in support of this request.
fields.rationale: Names the Bacon/Chu letter leads per the reference values, rather than vaguely referencing 'various members.'

fields.label: Of the requests made by this group in this bill, this request ranks as priority [ ] of [ ] total requests:
fields.rationale: The priority ranking of this request compared to others from the organization is not provided in the context.

fields.label: Why is the request a good use of taxpayer dollars?
fields.help_text: Please fully state your justification for use of federal taxpayer dollars.
fields.draft_value:
* Direct economic ROI of $3 for every $1 invested in NASA programs
* Bolsters U.S. competitive standing against expanding Chinese space science ambitions
* Ensures workforce stability for thousands of aerospace contractors and civil servants nationwide
* Supports nonpartisan, peer-reviewed science priorities established by the National Academies Decadal Surveys
fields.rationale: Draws from the Advocacy Talking Points regarding economic return, workforce, and international competition.

fields.label: Impact on California's 13th District and other comments/miscellaneous information:
fields.draft_value:
* $353,339 in recent NASA Science obligations in CA-13
* Active research at UC Merced ($381k award) utilizing Earth observation data to track invasive aquatic plants
* Critical climate resilience work at UC Merced ($125k award) focused on district water supply planning
* Direct support for the STEM talent pipeline and high-tech research jobs in Merced
fields.rationale: Directly cites local spending data and specific UC Merced grants for aquatic plant tracking and water resilience from the NASA Spending Context.
